Index.title: Token Swap Hub
Index.subtitle: Share idle tokens, earn credits, and consume collective AI power.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.pointsHelp: Internal platform credits used for settlement. You spend credits when using shared models, and earn credits when others use your contributed sources.
Dashboard.yourTokensHelp: These are the token sources you are contributing to the platform. Only enabled sources that stay below their credit cap can continue to receive traffic.
Dashboard.addTokenHelp: Register an official key or a custom OpenAI-compatible platform here. After saving, the hub can route requests through it and settle credits automatically.
Dashboard.directedUsageTip: Directed usage is not counted in total quota, credits, or rankings
Dashboard.platformKeyHelp: This is the key you should put into your client for Token Hub access. It is not your upstream provider key. Resetting it will invalidate the old one immediately.
Dashboard.platformUrlHelp: This is the base URL your AI client should call. Use it together with your platform key so requests go through Token Hub.
Dashboard.platformKeyTip: Use this key as your Bearer token and the platform URL as the base URL.
Dashboard.logDirectedProvided: {username} used your directed token for {count} tokens
Dashboard.providerFilterHelp: Filter the current list by platform or provider name, so you can focus on OpenAI or a specific custom source.
Dashboard.statusFilterHelp: Filter sources by state. ACTIVE means usable, PAUSED means manually stopped, and FROZEN usually means auth or quota problems.
Dashboard.typeHeaderHelp: Whether the record is normal usage, normal contribution, directed usage, or directed contribution.
Dashboard.providerHeaderHelp: Which platform or custom provider actually handled the request.
Dashboard.modelHeaderHelp: The model name used for this request.
Dashboard.tokensHeaderHelp: Shows input, output, and total token usage for the request.
Dashboard.priceHeaderHelp: Input and output pricing per 1M tokens. Token Hub uses this to estimate cost and credit changes.
Dashboard.costHeaderHelp: Estimated USD cost for this request based on model pricing and token usage.
Dashboard.pointsChangeHeaderHelp: How this record changed your credits. Negative means spent, positive means earned.
Dashboard.statusHeaderHelp: Processing result for the request. SUCCESS means it completed normally.
Dashboard.availableModelsSubtitle: Models you can call through the platform right now, with current pricing.
Dashboard.availableModelsTitleHelp: Only models that are truly callable right now are shown here. If no source is online, active, under its credit cap, or shared with you, this list will be empty.
Dashboard.noAvailableModels: No models are available right now. Current sources may be offline, paused, exhausted, or not shared with you.
Dashboard.usageRecordsTitleHelp: Your own request history, including model, pricing, token usage, estimated cost, and credit changes.
Dashboard.contributionRecordsTitleHelp: Records created when other users consume the sources you contributed, so you can review contribution details and earnings.
Dashboard.contributionRecordsTip: This section shows contribution records generated when others use your shared tokens.
Dashboard.noTokens: You haven't provided any tokens yet.
Dashboard.contributedHelp: The cumulative token volume this source has served through the platform.
Dashboard.confirmRevoke: Are you sure you want to stop sharing this token?
Dashboard.platformHelp: Choose whether you are contributing an official OpenAI source or a custom platform compatible with the OpenAI API.
Dashboard.apiKeyHelp: Enter the real upstream provider key here. The platform stores it securely and uses it only when proxying requests.
Dashboard.creditLimitHelp: Set the maximum cap for this source in platform credits. The current conversion is about 1000 points per 1 USD. Once the cap is reached, Token Hub stops routing new traffic to it automatically.
Dashboard.creditLimitPlaceholder: Leave empty for unlimited, unit pts (about 1000 pts = 1 USD)
Dashboard.allowedUsersTip: Directed tokens are free for both parties (no points charged)
Dashboard.allowedUsersHelp: Only these usernames can use this source. Directed sharing is useful for friends or specific teammates and does not follow normal credit settlement.
Dashboard.customProviderNameHelp: A display name for your custom platform. It will appear in lists, filters, and the available-models panel.
Dashboard.customBaseUrlHelp: The API root URL for this compatible platform. Token Hub will append specific endpoints to this base URL when proxying requests.
Dashboard.customModelsTip: Add multiple models and price them per 1M input/output tokens
Dashboard.customModelsHelp: Declare which models this custom platform supports and how they should be priced, so Token Hub can route requests and compute credits correctly.
Dashboard.customModelIdHelp: The model identifier sent in the request, such as gpt-4o-mini or deepseek-chat.
Dashboard.customModelNameHelp: A friendly display name shown to users in lists and logs.
Dashboard.customInputPriceHelp: Price for every 1 million input tokens. Token Hub uses it to calculate input-side cost and credits.
Dashboard.customOutputPriceHelp: Price for every 1 million output tokens. Token Hub uses it to calculate output-side cost and credits.
Dashboard.toolsSubtitle: Quota management, multi-platform monitoring and more features are under development.
Dashboard.announcementsSubtitle: Read the latest platform notices, maintenance updates, and product changes.
Dashboard.announcementTitle: ⚠️ Platform in Testing — Your Feedback Matters
Dashboard.announcementContent:
🚧 The platform is currently in testing. Some features may be unstable.

📩 If you find any bugs, email hhuhzl@outlook.com with details. Confirmed valid bugs will be rewarded with tokens!

---

📌 Platform Features:
🔑 Share Tokens → Earn credits
💎 Spend credits → Use collective AI power
🎯 Directed sharing → Friends use for free, no credits or rankings impact
🏆 Leaderboard → See community rankings (excludes directed)
🌐 Currently supported: OpenAI and custom OpenAI-compatible platforms

Thank you for your participation and support!
Dashboard.adminSubtitle: Administrators can manage the announcement list here.
Dashboard.announcementManagerTip: Publish multiple announcements and present them as expandable items on the public page.
Dashboard.noAdminAnnouncements: There are no announcements yet. Create the first one.
